name: Daily Briefing
author: Otian AI
description: A morning summary of today's calendar events sent to Telegram.
long_description: Start every day informed. The Daily Briefing routine checks your Google Calendar each morning and sends a concise summary of the day's events to your Telegram chat. Includes meeting times, titles, and any preparation notes.

default_action.prompt: Give me a complete summary of today's calendar. Include event times, titles, locations, and any preparation I should do.

setup_steps: Install the Calendar Management skill and connect Google Calendar first.
